title: Copilot
placeholder: Ask a legal question or request a draft…
disclaimer: AI-assisted work product — verify before use.
copilot_requires_professional_or_solo_pl: Copilot requires Professional or Solo plan
no_open_tasks_on_this_matter: No open tasks on this matter.
no_plans_yet_create_one_above: No plans yet. Create one above.
plan_title_eg_eviction_response_strategy: Plan title, e.g. Eviction response strategy
select_an_active_firm_tenant_to_use_copi: Select an active firm tenant to use Copilot.
contextUsageHint: Copilot is using this context for summaries, suggestions, and drafts.
planCreditsHint: Your plan uses AI credits per message.
outOfCredits: You're out of AI credits. Top up your firm wallet to continue using Copilot.
somethingWentWrong: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
matterCopilotDescription: I have context on this matter. Ask me to summarize, draft updates, identify risks, or suggest next steps.
clientCopilotDescription: I have context on this client. Ask me about KYC gaps, matter status, or how to proceed.
firmCopilotGreeting: Good day {name}! I can help with your morning brief, task summary, client updates, and more.
draftsEmptyHint: Ask Copilot to draft a document on any matter — your AI-generated drafts will appear here.
deleteDraftConfirmDescription: This AI draft will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
quickStartDraftStatus: Draft a client status update for [Matter]
quickStartDemandLetter: Write a demand letter for my matter
planModeDescription: Build an editable plan, clarify with questions, then send steps to agents.
planReviewNotice: Agent plans require human review. Run only after each step is accurate, scoped, and safe for the matter.
workflowClientUpdateSteps: Summarize matter progress|Draft client-safe update|Create follow-up task
workflowFilingPrepSteps: List required facts|Draft document outline|Flag missing evidence
workflowBillingReviewSteps: Summarize billable work|Draft invoice narrative|Create approval task
historyEmptyHint: Your Copilot conversations will appear here.
noInsightsPermission: You don't have permission to view Copilot insights.
insightsFirmHint: Firm-wide brief above uses your tenant workspace. Open a matter or client for deeper insights.
morningBriefEmpty: Your daily brief will appear here once generated.
auditDescription: Action history for Copilot (proposed, approved, executed)
auditCardDescription: All Copilot tool executions and approvals. Click a row for details.
auditEmpty: No audit entries yet. Use Copilot to create tasks or events and they will appear here.
tasksDue: {count, plural, one {# task due} other {# tasks due}}
overdueInvoices: {count, plural, one {# overdue invoice} other {# overdue invoices}}
pendingApprovals: {count, plural, one {# pending approval} other {# pending approvals}}
